meaning: n.小孩弄的唾液湿纸团,<美>[棒]唾沫曲球(指投手将球一端弄湿,使球在空中作弧线运动,为犯规球)
examples: A spitball hit the principal on his nose.
Reliever Hugh Casey delivers a sinker (some say illegal spitball) to Yankee batter Tommy Henrich, who swings and misses for strike three.
Along with the spitball-blowers and OMG hyperventilators, there are smart sites that use smart prose and smart graphics (and are quite capable of satirizing everybody else).
